Bash(cd /home/cameron/central && uv run python -c "
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1280, 'height': 800})
    page.goto('file:///home/cameron/central/docs/livestream.html')
    page.wait_for_timeout(2000)
    
    # Click Network button
    page.click('#btn-network')
    page.wait_for_timeout(1000)
    page.screenshot(path='/tmp/livestream-network.png')
    
    # Check console for errors
    errors = []
    page.on('console', lambda msg: errors.append(msg.text) if msg.type == 'error' else None)
    page.wait_for_timeout(500)
    
    browser.close()
    print('JS errors:', errors if errors else 'none')
    print('done')
" 2>&1)
Bash(ps aux | grep "indexer.worker" | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}')

Bash(cd /home/cameron/central && uv run python -c "
import httpx

# Check luna
try:
    resp = httpx.get('https://public.api.bsky.app/xrpc/app.bsky.actor.getProfile', params={'actor': 'luna.pds.witchcraft.systems'}, timeout=15)
    d = resp.json()
    print(f'Luna: {d.get(\"displayName\")} - {d.get(\"description\",\"\")[:100]}')
    print(f'  Posts: {d.get(\"postsCount\")}, Followers: {d.get(\"followersCount\")}')
except: print('Luna: not found')

print()

# Check astrra
try:
    resp = httpx.get('https://public.api.bsky.app/xrpc/app.bsky.actor.getProfile', params={'actor': 'astrra.space'}, timeout=15)
    d = resp.json()
    print(f'Astrra: {d.get(\"displayName\")} - {d.get(\"description\",\"\")[:100]}')
    print(f'  Posts: {d.get(\"postsCount\")}, Followers: {d.get(\"followersCount\")}')
except: print('Astrra: not found')

print()

# Astral
try:
    resp = httpx.get('https://public.api.bsky.app/xrpc/app.bsky.actor.getProfile', params={'actor': 'astral100.bsky.social'}, timeout=15)
    d = resp.json()
    print(f'Astral: {d.get(\"displayName\")} - {d.get(\"description\",\"\")[:100]}')
    print(f'  Posts: {d.get(\"postsCount\")}, Followers: {d.get(\"followersCount\")}')
except: print('Astral: not found')
" 2>&1)
